title: crotalaria goetzei
intro: Crotalaria goetzei, also known as the 'goetze's rattle box', is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria goetzei include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to act as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria goetzei include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
